sizing_rule.note: Allocate percentage P to tangent portfolio where variance equals expected return (E = V). Derived from equations (7.01a) and (7.02). User must calculate optimal_f from their specific AHPR distribution; formula E = AHPR - 1 defines the tangent point. Warning: This allocation exhibits higher drawdowns than lower-variance alternatives.

source_rule_text: The geometric optimal portfolio balances expected return and variance such that E equals V, which results in higher drawdowns than portfolios with lower variance.
